rationale.R1.6: Polished prose is clear and concise, but some claims could be tightened.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is incomplete; no flags for out-of-reach claims or confidence markings.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is mostly within scope, but the 4-hour lookahead claim may be an issue (see notes).
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance appears to be good, but some minor regressions might exist due to lack of explicit harm identification.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are mostly good, but some minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
